message:
fix(wal-fec): add sync_all before rename in sidecar rewrite

The BufWriter flush() only pushes data to the OS kernel buffer, not to
disk. Without sync_all(), a crash after rename could leave the sidecar
file with stale or incomplete content. Use into_inner() to unwrap the
BufWriter, then sync_all() the underlying File before renaming.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
